chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Execution No. 153 of 2000 _____________________________________ ___________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S). ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of CMA No.227/17 13th October, 2017 Mr. Aamir Maqsood, Advocate for D.H. Mr. Abdul Hameed, Advocate for J.D.No.1 Mr. Liaquat Hussain, Advocate for J.D.No.3. Mr. Saleemuddin A. Patoli, Asst. Attorney General. ------------------- Vide order dated 20.09.2017, it was specifically ordered that at least 50% of the unpaid amount be deposited by J.D.No.1-National Logistic Cell, so that their objections to this Execution can be heard. Nazir of this Court has submitted his short report that no amount has been deposited in compliance of the order dated 20.09.2017, wherein the consequence was also mentioned. Learned counsel for J.D.No.1 requests for some time as the amount could not be deposited due to inter departmental procedural compliances. As far as the inter departmental procedures are concerned, this cannot be a cogent ground for delaying the matter. Admittedly, the Judgment and Decree of 03.03.1999 till date has not been completely and fully satisfied. In these circumstances, so also mentioned in the last order of 20.09.2017, the corporate Bank Account of Judgment Debtor No.1-NLC to the extent of unpaid / un-satisfied amount of Rs.15 Million (Rupees One Crore and Fifty Lacs only) stands attached. Nazir Office to take further measures in this regard. Adjourned to a date in office. Judge Riaz / P.S*
